notes.quote: Prices in EUR per share. 1 share = 0.10% of the backer pool (30% of first sale).
notes.candles: Candle = OHLCV. open/close/high/low in EUR; volume in shares.
notes.orderBook: Bids descend from best price; asks ascend. cumShares is running depth from top of book.
notes.fairValue: Fair value estimate is poolPct × comp_median / sharesIssued = 30% × €86,000 / 1000 = €25.80. Current premium reflects scarcity + early-stage signal.
